title: Stop Labour's Jobs Tax | Alan Mak
meta_description: Local MP Alan Mak has launched a petition calling on the Labour Government to scrap their £25 billion Jobs Tax. Please sign Alan's petition below.
headings: h3: Local MP Alan Mak has launched a petition calling on the Labour Government to scrap their £25 billion Jobs Tax. Please sign Alan's petition below.
h3: Alan Mak Member of Parliament for the Havant Constituency
